name: FutureTech II Acquisition Corp. Class A Common Stock
summary: FutureTech II Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is seeking to focus its search on target businesses that have developed artificial intelligence enabled technology and are focused on the health and wellness and consumer experience sectors. The company's headquarters are in New York.
